'''chashatha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:gracillarioid|gracillarioid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-sh-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:gracillarioid|gracillarioid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| chashatha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæshæthæth|chæshæthæth]] || [[word:chæshæthæj|chæshæthæj]] || [[word:chæshæthæsh|chæshæthæsh]] || [[word:chæshæthæ|chæshæthæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chashashathath|chashashathath]] || [[word:chashashathaj|chashashathaj]] || [[word:chashashathash|chashashathash]] || [[word:chashashatha|chashashatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chashathath|chashathath]] || [[word:chashathaj|chashathaj]] || [[word:chashathash|chashathash]] || [[word:chashatha|chashatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chashafthath|chashafthath]] || [[word:chashafthaj|chashafthaj]] || [[word:chashafthash|chashafthash]] || [[word:chashafthaf|chashafthaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chashathatha|chashathatha]] || [[word:chashathaja|chashathaja]] || [[word:chashathasha|chashathasha]] || [[word:chashathaka|chashathaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chashathath|chashathath]] || [[word:chashathaj|chashathaj]] || [[word:chashathash|chashathash]] || [[word:chashatha|chashatha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chashathathal|chashathathal]] || [[word:chashathajal|chashathajal]] || [[word:chashathashal|chashathashal]] || [[word:chashathakal|chashathakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chashathathatha|chashathathatha]] || [[word:chashathajaja|chashathajaja]] || [[word:chashathashasha|chashathashasha]] || [[word:chashathaka|chashathaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chashathathan|chashathathan]] || [[word:chashathajan|chashathajan]] || [[word:chashathashan|chashathashan]] || [[word:chashathakan|chashathakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chashathathaoro|chashathathaoro]] || [[word:chashathajaoro|chashathajaoro]] || [[word:chashathashaoro|chashathashaoro]] || [[word:chashathakaoro|chashathakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
